# Scion

> Scion backend patterns into your project. A copy-paste code library for common backend modules — auth, CRUD, file upload, rate limiting, and more.

Scion is not a framework. It is a pattern registry. You copy code from the `registry/` directory into your project and adapt it with minimal changes. Each module is self-contained, fully documented, and ready to run.

## Docs
- [Getting Started](docs/getting-started.md): How to use Scion in your project
- [Registry Index](registry/index.json): Machine-readable list of all patterns
- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md): Design principles and conventions

## Optional
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md): How to add new patterns
- [License](LICENSE): MIT
